positive: A stylized geometric depiction of a serene mountain vista at sunrise. The composition should feature interlocking abstract layers of mountain peaks and flowing abstract clouds, rendered with clean, bold silhouettes. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, creamy gold, and slate blue. The style is highly detailed flat graphic design meets Art Deco illustration. Strong, centered composition suitable for a chest print on apparel. Minimal gradients, emphasizing clean lines and crisp vector edges. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, vector art, graphic novel style.
negative: low quality, poorly drawn, noisy, blurred, grainy, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, amateur, dirty edges, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, writing, logos
